title: Ubuugan fleshborer

'''Ubuugan fleshborers''' were [[Parasite/Legends|parasitic]] winged [[Worm/Legends|worms]] native to the swamps of [[Ubuuga]] The fleshborers spent the majority of their life cycle within the original host body, emerging only to find another host. Upon finding a suitable host, they shed their wings and burrowed into the creature's skin. They were able to eat through some form of metal via corrosive secretions. [[Rodomium]] was vulnerable to their secretions, however [[Mandalorian armor/Legends|Mandalorian armor]] was resistant.<ref name="CSWE" /> 

The [[Ubuugan]] species that shared their homeworld evolved biological defences against the parasites and regarded them as a delicacy.

[[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] third cousin, [[Volpau]], was killed by fleshborers while on Ubuuga, however the cause of his death was undetermined at the time. His body was placed in a rodomium casket, which was shipped back to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] for [[Cremation/Legends|ritual incineration]] on the freighter ''[[Mingula]]'', While on route, the fleshborers emerged and killed the [[Zylurian]] crew,

The infamous [[bounty hunter]] [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] picked up the ship's [[distress beacon]] and boarded, hoping to find valuable salvage. Detecting no life forms, he had his prisoner, [[Tsumo]], board first, to test how dangerous it was. While searching through the treasures in the ships hold, they were attacked by a swarm of fleshborers. Tsumo was killed but Fett escaped due to the resilience of [[Boba Fett's armor|his armor]]. He set off an explosion that destroyed the ship, and presumably the worms. 

Some managed get onto [[Slave I/Legends|Slave I]] but were devoured by Fett's other prisoner, the [[Ubuugan]] [[Chung]], who regarded them as tasty.<ref name="BF">[[Boba Fett ½|''Boba Fett'' ½]]</ref>
